name: Apricot Cream Cheese Drops
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Pecans, coarsely chopped OR Flaked Coconut
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix Crisco and flour until well combined.
3. Add baking powder, cinnamon, and salt; stir until incorporated.
4. Stir in cream cheese and milk until smooth.
5. Gradually add brown sugar and apricot preserves until the mixture is thick enough to form balls.
6. Roll teaspoon-sized portions of dough into balls.
7. Place balls on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
